prompt: Without looking up Sanity docs online, explain which access path you would use for each task and why: a one-off document count, a reusable migration, and an app/server implementation. Then run only the safe document-count read for this repo. Do not print secrets.
assertions: The output explains when to use CLI/helper scripts, the Sanity SDK, and direct HTTP/API calls.
The output runs only a safe read-only document-count query for this repo.
The output avoids external documentation and does not reveal secret values.
